2249720.name: BACKROOMS: NO RETURN Demo
2249720.description: Explore and face the dangers of the poolrooms in an immersive cooperative horror game. You play as a scientist whose mission is to explore the depths of the poolrooms for research purposes. You will soon realise that you have made a mistake and that there is no way out. Through escaping from various creatures you will have to find a way out of there.
2249720.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
